Lyrics.text:
Anarana tsy manam-paharoa
(Tsy mba manam-paharoa)
Anarana 'zay tiana tokoa
(Sady tiana tokoa)
Anarana miraki-java-tsoa
(Rakitry ny zava-tsoa)
Moa fantatrao ve Jesosy Kristy?
(Fantatrao ve Kristy?).

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Anaran-tsoa, Anaran-tsoa
Anaran-tsoa
Jesosy Kristy,
Anaran-tsoa.

Anarana hobin'Anjely ar?
Anarana ankalazaina et?
Satria nietry tany Kalvar?
Moa fantatrao ve? Jesosy Kristy.

Anarana 'zay hoderaina indray
Rehefa vory anatrehan-dRay
Ar? an-danitra mandrakizay
Moa fantatrao ve, Jesosy Kristy?

Raha sendra kivy mantsy izany fo
Fa he manindry mafy ny manjo
Ka mila hampilofika tokoa
Dia misy toky : Jesosy Kristy?
